<script>
/* ── Build-time constants — injected by Quarto from docs/_variables.yml ───
   Quarto shortcode values are substituted at render time, before the
   browser ever runs this script.                                           */
const OM_VERSIONS = {
  macos:   "{{< var macos_version >}}",
  android: "{{< var android_version >}}",
  windows: "{{< var windows_version >}}",
  cli:     "{{< var cli_version >}}",
  macos_tag_prefix:   "{{< var macos_tag_prefix >}}",
  android_tag_prefix: "{{< var android_tag_prefix >}}",
  windows_tag_prefix: "{{< var windows_tag_prefix >}}",
  cli_tag_prefix:     "{{< var cli_tag_prefix >}}"
};
const OM_STORE = {
  play: "{{< var playstore_url >}}",
  app:  "{{< var appstore_url >}}"
};
</script>

<script src="download.js"></script>

<!-- Filled by JavaScript on DOMContentLoaded -->
<div id="om-hero"></div>
<div id="om-all"></div>

<noscript>
::: {.callout-warning}
JavaScript is required to detect your platform and build download links.
Please enable JavaScript or visit [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/merlos/openme/releases) directly.
:::
</noscript>
